message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 40
  MessageAlign left
}

participant "管理员" as Admin
participant "教师管理" as TeacherMgmt
participant "控制层" as Controller
participant "业务层" as Service
participant "持久层" as Persistence

Admin -> TeacherMgmt : 添加请求
TeacherMgmt -> Controller : 输入相关信息，添加请求
Controller -> Service : 相关信息，请求登录
Service -> Persistence : 相关信息，添加请求
Persistence -> Persistence : 根据相关信息添加
Persistence --> Service : 返回添加对象
Service --> Controller : 返回添加对象
Controller --> TeacherMgmt : 添加成功

@enduml
```
